title: Daewoo Compact Travel Kettle – Lightweight Cordless Kettle with 1L Capacity, Water Level Indicator & Auto Shut-Off – Ideal for Camping, Caravans, Offices, or Job Sites
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Ultra-Portable Design – Lightweight and compact, perfect for travel, camping, job sites, student rooms, or small kitchens.
Cordless Convenience – 360° swivel base for easy lifting and pouring, with power indicator light for intuitive use.
Efficient 1L Capacity – Boils enough for 3–4 cups—ideal for single or multiple use without wasting energy or space.
Built-In Safety Features – Includes auto shut-off and boil-dry protection for worry-free boiling every time.
Versatile Usage – Whether you’re in a caravan, tent, office, or workshop, enjoy hot drinks anywhere with this dependable electric kettle.
description: Stay refreshed wherever you are with the Daewoo Essentials 1L Cordless Kettle – a lightweight and compact travel essential designed for real life on the go. Whether you’re boiling water for tea on a camping trip, heating water in a caravan, or need a reliable brew on a busy building site, this versatile kettle is your perfect companion. Its 1-litre capacity is ideal for smaller spaces or travel setups, while the easy-to-read water level indicator ensures no overfilling. With cordless operation, a 360° base, and a power indicator light, the Fine Elements kettle combines convenience with portability. Safety is built-in with auto shut-off and boil dry protection—giving you peace of mind, no matter where you are. Designed for those who value mobility, functionality, and simplicity, this kettle delivers consistent performance in a compact form. From early morning brews on site to wind-down cuppas under the stars, it’s made to travel with you.
